title: woodsia pseudopolystichoides
intro: Woodsia pseudopolystichoides, also known as the false polystichum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Woodsia and is native to parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Woodsia pseudopolystichoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Woodsia pseudopolystichoides can be prepared as a tea or infusions, which are typically made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies.
